Bash(git -c user.email=rushit@local.dev -c user.name='Rushit Shah' commit -q -m "fix\(audit\): address audit findings — \(a\) a11y on hero headlines: ChaoticHeadline gets aria-label + aria-hidden decorative spans \(fixes triple-letter 'PPPaaa' SR read\); Hail + Artist + Exhibitions H1s wrap decorative markup in aria-hidden span with an aria-label on the h1 carrying clean text \(fixes colouron/layers,then/workhas SR bugs\); \(b\) per-page <title>: route-level layout.tsx added for /artist /exhibitions /collection /contact \(was sharing one generic title\); \(c\) Instagram card on home: split single giant <a> wrapping the whole block into a content div + a scoped 'Follow on Instagram' anchor with aria-label so SR no longer reads one 300-char link name; \(d\) Contact page 'Elsewhere' now includes Artwork Archive \(was missing\) and all three external links get target=_blank + rel=noopener + aria-label; \(e\) Collection noscript wrapped in a real <noscript> element \(was bleeding into a11y tree\); \(f\) Nav clock gets title + aria-label 'Studio time \\u00b7 Vadodara'; \(g\) CTA casing normalized to lowercase + arrow \(Enter the collection, Collector enquiries, Start a conversation\); \(h\) home hero CTAs stack on mobile \(flex-col below sm:\) with whitespace-nowrap to prevent 390px overflow; \(i\) nav responsive: md:\\u2192lg: so hamburger shows up to 1024px, fixing the 1148px overlap and 390px hidden-hamburger bug; \(j\) Footer link 'ArtworkArchive' renamed to 'Artwork Archive' to match the service brand; \(k\) home + contact reply promise normalized to 'I reply to everything within 48 hours'")

Bash(git -c user.email=rushit@local.dev -c user.name='Rushit Shah' commit -q -m "fix\(audit-round-2\): \(a\) mobile overflow: html+body get overflow-x:hidden + max-width:100vw; display-xl/lg/md min font-sizes reduced \(3rem\\u219248px \\u2192 2.25rem\\u219236px etc\) + overflow-wrap:break-word so 390px viewports can't be pushed wider by a single word; \(b\) visible 'STUDIO \\u00b7' prefix added before the nav clock \(so visitors without SR see what the time refers to, not just a random 00:15 IST number\); \(c\) CTA casing normalized to Title Case sitewide to match nav: 'Enter the Collection', 'Collector Enquiries', 'Start a Conversation', 'See Every Piece', 'Enquire About a Piece', 'Get in Touch'; \(d\) Footer [02] INDEX now marks the current page \\u2014 active link at full opacity + bold + a lime '\\u00b7 HERE' tag + aria-current=page")
